message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 243 migrate 8 reservation/accounts/usage-metrics storage sites to cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Additional storage surface migration. 8 sites across 3 clusters:

Reservation management:
1. L22086 robot reservation release:
   `release_reservation_with_cx(&storage_cx, reservation_id)`
2. L22107 robot reservation list expire:
   `expire_stale_reservations_with_cx(&storage_cx)`
3. L22113 robot reservation list fetch:
   `list_active_reservations_with_cx(&storage_cx)`
4. L30608 top-level reservations CLI expire:
   `expire_stale_reservations_with_cx(&storage_cx)`
5. L30614 top-level reservations CLI fetch:
   `list_active_reservations_with_cx(&storage_cx)`

Accounts:
6. L30981 accounts by service: `get_accounts_by_service_with_cx(&storage_cx, &service_key)`

Usage metrics (4-query cluster):
7-10. L31846-31849 ft status:
   `query_usage_metrics_with_cx(&storage_cx, query_...)` × 4
   (token_metrics, cost_metrics, rl_metrics, wf_metrics)

All use standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern
with locally-scoped `storage_cx` bindings.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Total cross-crate migration through tick 243: 91 sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
